original_image_tags: A single sheet of aged, lined paper. The paper has three hole-punches along the left margin and shows signs of wear, including minor tears and creases. A blue ink stamp is located in the upper left quadrant. The body of the page contains faint, illegible handwriting in pencil or light pen, appearing to be notes or a draft that has bled through or faded significantly. No other text or markings are legible.

elements.description: A blue ink stamp in the top left corner. The stamp contains the text 'RECEIVED', 'JUL 16 12:36 PM 47', 'INTERNAL SECURITY', 'F. B. I.', and 'DEPT OF JUSTICE'.

judge.reason: Both sides agree on a blue ink stamp in the upper left area, but only Description B provides the specific legible text inside the stamp while Description A describes the handwriting as illegible, without contradicting the stamp's presence.
